meaning: n.贬眼睛者,瞥视者,闪光警戒灯
examples: Blinker auto off can be disabled (option).
The driver flashed the blinker to indicate a left turn.
Synchronized blinker lights are set up in New York and San Francisco.
The spot did not show a Jeep, just its red brake lights and blinker as it burrowed under the deep snow and stopped at a stop sign.
